evals.prompt: 미리캔버스 오늘 챌린지 배경 요소야. 수영장 바닥, 물결 또는 수면 배경을 imagegen으로 12개 만들고 JPG로 저장해줘. CSV도 같이 만들어줘.
evals.expected_output: Routes to background-jpg, uses built-in image_gen once per variant, preserves source PNGs in the workspace, converts final files to JPG, makes a contact sheet, and writes DesignHub metadata with extensionless fileName, blank uniqueId, tier Premium, contentType Background, and 20-25 buyer-facing keywords.

evals.prompt: 아까 HTML보다 imagegen 버전이 더 좋아. 그 스타일로 DesignHub 배경 JPG 후보를 더 뽑아줘.
evals.expected_output: Recognizes natural/photorealistic background quality as a reason to prefer imagegen over HTML, keeps the new imagegen batch separate from prior HTML outputs, preserves source PNGs, converts to validated JPG backgrounds, and reports the correct folders and CSV without external submission.

evals.prompt: DesignHub CSV 등록했더니 uniqueId가 잘못됐고 파일명 확장자를 빼라고 나와. 배경 JPG용 CSV를 다시 만들어줘.
evals.expected_output: Repairs the background metadata CSV by removing extensions from fileName, leaving uniqueId blank unless DesignHub provided it, using contentType Background, preserving keywords, and validating row-to-JPG stem matching.

evals.prompt: 미리캔버스 DesignHub에 올릴 투명 PNG 요소로 글래스모피즘 물방울 6개 만들어줘. imagegen으로 만들고 헬퍼로 배경제거한 다음 Photopea로 350DPI 처리해줘.
evals.expected_output: Routes to png-element, uses the installed $image-gen skill for flat chroma-key source images, preserves sources, runs scripts/chroma_key.py into assets/raw, applies magenta-fringe decontamination when the key and subject colors allow it, uses Photopea/project runner for assets/processed, creates upload-safe unique PNG basenames and matching CSV, and validates alpha, size, DPI, dark/white/checker previews, keywords, and CSV alignment.

evals.prompt: 이 캐릭터 스티커를 투명 배경 PNG로 만들고 싶어. 초록색 옷이라 배경색은 겹치지 않게 골라서 생성하고 로컬 helper로 배경 제거까지 해줘.
evals.expected_output: Chooses a non-green key color such as magenta, prompts $image-gen to avoid that key color in the subject, runs the bundled chroma_key.py helper, decontaminates magenta cast only when the subject has no real pink/purple/magenta details, checks alpha/corners/fringes on dark/white/checker previews, and saves non-destructively.

evals.prompt: 투명한 유리컵 제품컷을 native transparent로 바로 뽑아줘. 가능하면 배경제거 없이.
evals.expected_output: Recognizes glass/native transparency as complex, explains the built-in chroma-key default versus CLI native transparency fallback, and asks for confirmation before switching to CLI/API.

evals.prompt: 이 스킬을 Windows PC PowerShell에서 써야 해. 투명 PNG helper랑 Photopea runner 명령을 윈도우 경로로 안내해줘.
evals.expected_output: Provides Windows PowerShell-safe commands using py -3 or python, ./scripts/... paths, backtick line continuations, quoted portable output paths, and avoids Bash-only environment-variable fallback syntax while keeping the transparent PNG DesignHub route distinct from SVG and GIF routes.

evals.prompt: 미리캔버스 DesignHub에 올릴 색상 변경 가능한 단순 말풍선 SVG 요소 10개를 만들고 CSV도 준비해줘.
evals.expected_output: Routes to svg-element, uses a true vector source/export path instead of raster-only imagegen output, keeps each design simple with five or fewer colors, removes backgrounds, validates SVG XML/viewBox/no embedded raster/no external scripts, and writes metadata with extensionless fileName, blank or DesignHub-provided uniqueId, tier Premium, contentType SVG element, and buyer-facing keywords.

evals.prompt: DesignHub GIF 요소로 움직이는 반짝이 스티커 6개 만들어줘. 영상 말고 일러스트 애니메이션으로.
evals.expected_output: Routes to gif-element, builds or preserves frame/animation sources, encodes animated GIFs rather than still GIFs or MP4 footage, verifies playback, loop stability, removed/transparent background, 700-1920 px bounds, under-25MB size, and writes metadata with extensionless fileName and contentType GIF.
